title: arctium lappa var. tomentosum
intro: Arctium lappa var. tomentosum, also known as woolly burdock, is a variant of the burdock plant species, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions, including arthritis, eczema, and digestive issues. The health benefits of woolly burdock include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. Woolly burdock can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
